message:
test(conformance): add I/O adversarial edge cases

- Add 2 new I/O adversarial cases: future version magic, void zero-size dtype
- Update coverage: I/O adversarial 33→35, total 137→139

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 | Ufunc operations | 381 | 31 | 60 | 472 | Good - core ops well covered |
 | Signal processing | 303 | — | — | 303 | Good - extensive conv/corr/fft, atleast_nd, edge cases |
 | Polynomials | 92 | — | — | 92 | Good - all 5 families, edge cases |
-| I/O (npy/npz/text) | 66 | 38 | 33 | 137 | Good - parser boundaries covered |
+| I/O (npy/npz/text) | 66 | 38 | 35 | 139 | Good - parser boundaries covered |
 | Linear algebra | 63 | 28 | 37 | 128 | Good - core decompositions, 1x1 edge cases, identity |
 | String arrays | 65 | — | — | 65 | Good - 33 char functions, empty/pattern edge cases |
 | RNG | 22 | 26 | 43 | 91 | Adequate + 39 statistical |

@@ -544,5 +544,35 @@
     ],
     "reason_code": "io_dtype_descriptor_invalid",
     "dtype_descr": "<c32"
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_magic_version_future_unsupported",
+    "operation": "magic_version",
+    "expected_error_contains": "invalid or unsupported npy/npz magic/version",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_magic_invalid",
+    "severity": "high",
+    "seed": 934,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/contract_table.md"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_magic_invalid",
+    "payload_prefix": [147, 78, 85, 77, 80, 89, 9, 0]
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_dtype_void_zero_size_rejected",
+    "operation": "dtype_decode",
+    "expected_error_contains": "dtype descriptor is invalid or unsupported",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_dtype_descriptor_invalid",
+    "severity": "medium",
+    "seed": 935,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/contract_table.md"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_dtype_descriptor_invalid",
+    "dtype_descr": "|V0"
   }
 ]
